title: Here are three political story lines to watch this week: Texas face-off, Trump’s health and the Iran talks. Read more in today’s WSJ Politics newsletter:
State Attorney General Ken Paxton clinched the Texas Republican nomination for U.S. Senate, defeating longtime Sen. John Cornyn
Ex-JPMorgan banker Chirayu Rana hit with major setback in outrageous sex slave lawsuit hours before court appearance
Spencer Pratt reveals stunning West Coast destination for LA’s homeless if he wins election: ‘The mayor will welcome them’
Canada Strikes Landmark Deal to Export Liquefied Natural Gas to Germany
Russia ramps up threats against Ukraine. What does that say about the war?
Possible serial killer is latest horror to upend Mexico World Cup host region — two weeks before first match
Ferrari’s new $640K electric car already a massive fail — and looks just like a $30K Nissan: ‘Monstrosity’
Starbucks sees sales drop, mass protests in South Korea after ‘Tank Day’ promotion for massacre that killed 2K people
